Explanation: No beneficial owner data disclosed in award documentation.
Rule_Text: A Tenderer shall provide its/their Beneficial Ownership related information... if it/they will be awarded the contract.
Recommendation: Verify bidder registry and trade license via manual review to trace corporate shielding.

Explanation: Only one responsive tender was submitted, indicating high cartel or tailored spec risk.
Rule_Text: In the case of only one technically responsive tender, the above methodology shall not be applied... All Tenders can be rejected if there is a lack of effective competition.
Recommendation: Inspect technical specifications to check if requirements were deliberately tailored for a single vendor.

Rule_Name: Abnormally Low Bid / Significantly Low Tender
Explanation: Award price is significantly below the official engineer's estimate, threatening project execution quality.
Rule_Text: An ALB is one in which the Bid price, in combination with other elements, appears so low that it raises material concerns.
Recommendation: Conduct a strict price-loading or rate analysis to ensure the contractor is not underbidding to dump the project later.
